subtopics.title: Revision of JSS1-JSS2 Topics
subtopics.teaching_note: BECE (Basic Education Certificate Examination) tests JSS1-JSS3 mathematics. Format: Paper 1 (Obj, 60 questions, 1 hour), Paper 2 (Essay, 12 questions, 2 hours). Key topics: Number operations, Fractions/Decimals/Percentages, Algebra (simplification, equations), Geometry (angles, shapes, Pythagoras), Mensuration (area, volume, perimeter), Statistics (mean, median, mode), Ratio and Proportion. BECE tips: Read questions carefully, show all workings, manage time (spend ~1 min per objective question), check answers if time permits.

subtopics.title: Solving Simultaneous Linear Equations
common_misconceptions: Simultaneous equations always have a solution (they can have no solution or infinite solutions)
You can add equations without aligning variables
Graphical method is the most accurate
subtopics.teaching_note: Elimination method: 1) Make coefficients of one variable equal. 2) Add or subtract to eliminate. 3) Solve for remaining variable. 4) Substitute back. Worked example: 2x + 3y = 13 and x + 2y = 8. Multiply second by 2: 2x + 4y = 16. Subtract first: y = 3. Substitute: x + 6 = 8, x = 2. Substitution: Make one variable subject in one equation, substitute into other. Check: 2(2) + 3(3) = 4 + 9 = 13 ✓.
